QueryBody: SELECT    CASE      -- A) ไม่มีส่วนลด → gross เต็ม (ไม่ลด)      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN CAST(          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0))            * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]          AS DECIMAL(19,6))      -- B) มีส่วนลด → gross − Dis (Exclusive)      ELSE        CAST(          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0))            * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]          - $[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER]          AS DECIMAL(19,6))    END

SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.15.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN 0
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.14.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        OR ISNULL($[$38.11.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN 0
      ELSE
        CAST(
          $[$38.14.NUMBER] * $[$38.11.NUMBER]
          * $[$38.15.NUMBER] / 100
          AS DECIMAL(19,6))
    END

SELECT    CASE      -- A) ไม่มีส่วนลด → gross เต็ม (ไม่ลด)      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER], 0) = 0        THEN CAST(          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0))            * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]          AS DECIMAL(19,6))      -- B) มีส่วนลด → gross − Dis (Exclusive)      ELSE        CAST(          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0))            * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]          - $[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER]          AS DECIMAL(19,6))    END

QueryName: JE BP Address (ที่อยู่คู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT concat(T0.[Street],' ',T0.[StreetNo],' ',T0.[Block],' ', T0.[City],' ',T0.[County], '  ',T0.[ZipCode]) FROM CRD1 T0  INNER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] WHERE (T0.[GlblLocNum] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_LPBranch] and T0.[CardCode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B' )  or ( $[JDT1.U_SLD_LPBranch]  = ' ' and T0.[CardCode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B' )

QueryName: JE_Select BP Name (ชื่อคู่ค้า)
QueryBody:
SELECT T0.[U_SLD_FullName] 
From OCRD T0 
where T0.[CardCode] = $[$76.U_SLD_SuppCode]

QueryName: JE_Select Tax Id (เลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษี)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[LicTradNum] FROM OCRD T0  where T0.Cardcode = $[JDT1.U_SLD_Suppcode]

QueryName: JE Select BP Branch (สาขาคู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[GlblLocNum] From CRD1 T0 inner join OCRD T1 on T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] where T1.[CardCode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B'

QueryName: JE Cal WhBaseAmount (ฐานภาษีหัก ณ ที่จ่าย)
QueryBody: SELECT (($[$76.6.number]*100)/(SELECT T0.[Rate]       FROM OWHT T0                where T0.[WTcode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_WTcode] ))

QueryName: JE Cal WhBaseAmount (ฐานภาษีหัก ณ ที่จ่าย)
QueryBody: SELECT (($[$76.6.number]*100)/(SELECT T0.[Rate]       FROM OWHT T0                where T0.[WTcode] = $[JDT1.U_SLD_WTcode] ))

QueryName: JE_JV Select WH Code (รหัสภาษีหัก ณ ที่จ่าย)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[WTCode], T0.[WTName], T0.[Rate] FROM OWHT T0 WHERE T0.[Inactive] = 'N'

QueryName: JV BP Address (ที่อยู่คู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT concat(T0.[Street],' ',T0.[StreetNo],' ',T0.[Block],' ', T0.[City],' ',T0.[County], '  ',T0.[ZipCode]) FROM CRD1 T0  INNER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] WHERE T0.[GlblLocNum] = $[BTF1.U_SLD_LPBranch] and T0.[CardCode] = $[BTF1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B'or ( $[BTF1.U_SLD_LPBranch]  = ' ' and T0.[CardCode] = $[BTF1.U_SLD_SuppCode] and T0.[AdresType] = 'B' )

QueryName: JV_Select BP Name (ชื่อคู่ค้า)
QueryBody: SELECT DISTINCT T0.[U_SLD_FullName] From OCRD T0 where T0.[CardCode] = $[BTF1.U_SLD_SuppCode]

QueryName: JV_Select Tax Id (เลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษี)
QueryBody: SELECT T0.[LicTradNum] FROM OCRD T0  where T0.Cardcode = $[BTF1.U_SLD_SuppCode]

QueryName: JV_Select BP Branch (สาขาคู่ค้า)
QueryBody:
SELECT T0.[GlblLocNum]
FROM CRD1 T0
INNER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode]
WHERE T1.[CardCode] = $[BTF1.U_SLD_SuppCode]
AND T0.[AdresType] = 'B'

QueryName: JV Cal WhBaseAmount (ฐานภาษีหัก ณ ที่จ่าย)
